fix_applied.method: Dark mode override block injected before </style> in all 10 files
key_changes: Alert boxes: light yellow/blue/red → dark translucent equivalents
All badges: light backgrounds → dark translucent equivalents
Party column vars: light pastels → dark translucent
All ref-pills and sec-ref badges converted to teal-on-dark

remediated_panels.label: TWDC/ESPN Negotiation
remediated_panels.notes: Dark conversion eliminated light-mode remnants. Section headers now high-contrast. Risk register readable. Dense but no blocking defects.

remediated_panels.label: FOX Negotiation
remediated_panels.notes: Deal snapshot and timeline sections render cleanly in dark mode. Sidebar dark red accent + dark content area cohesive. Visual hierarchy clear.

remediated_panels.label: Monumental Negotiation
remediated_panels.notes: Typography weight inconsistency resolved by dark text overrides. Alert boxes now properly dark. Open issues list reads cleanly.

remediated_panels.label: NHL Negotiation
remediated_panels.notes: Dark conversion achieves threshold. Density remains a watch item — issue table is content-dense but no blocking defect. No category below 3.

remediated_panels.label: MLB Negotiation
remediated_panels.notes: Dark conversion brings to threshold. Alert blocks and badges render correctly. Dense table rows but all essential text readable.

remediated_panels.label: Golf Negotiation
remediated_panels.notes: Top-nav layout's white nav bar (#fff) now dark. KPI row renders well in dark mode. Rate card blank-cell reds readable. Low hierarchy and spacing issues from before resolved.

remediated_panels.label: WBD Negotiation
remediated_panels.notes: Alert blocks now dark-translucent. Critical WBD issues clearly highlighted. Table content is dense but passes threshold.

remediated_panels.label: FloSports Negotiation
remediated_panels.notes: Cleaner panel structure benefits well from dark conversion. Issue table and KPI summary row both readable and well-spaced. Premium feel strong.

remediated_panels.label: BravesVision Negotiation
remediated_panels.notes: Dark conversion achieves threshold. Some small status text warrants monitoring but nothing unreadable. All categories at floor or above.

remediated_panels.label: Samsung Negotiation
remediated_panels.notes: Clean dark layout. Issue summary table well-spaced. Sidebar integrates with dark content area cohesively. Strong premium feel.

summary.fix_description: Single dark mode CSS override block injected at end of <style> tag in all 10 files. CSS custom property overrides + class-level !important rules converted entire content area from light to EverPass dark design system.

merged_full_scorecard_note: Previous pass surfaces (NESN, Marquee, MSG, NBA, Charter) unmodified and retain their prior scores. 3 data-only mobile FAILs unaffected (server issue, not CSS). Updated overall: 27 PASS / 3 FAIL (data-only), pass rate 90%.
